data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: In test-provision-ruleset.sh, test_preflight_exits_nonzero_on_missing_gh runs 'env PATH=/usr/bin:/bin bash "$PROVISION_SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null' and checks for a non-zero exit. When provision-ruleset.sh does not yet exist (RED phase), bash exits non-zero because the file is not found — not because of missing gh CLI. The test appears to PASS even though the behavior under test has not been implemented.
File: tests/scripts/test-provision-ruleset.sh
Category: verification
Mitigation: Once provision-ruleset.sh exists, this test will correctly test the gh preflight. Low risk — the primary RED gate (test_script_exists) still blocks correctly.
data.title: [test-provision-ruleset]: test_preflight_exits_nonzero_on_missing_gh passes for wrong reason in RED phase
